title: germinate peppers
description:
Need 15 plants.
Assume 50% germination rate and plant 30 seeds.

title: sow carrots
description:
252 seeds, 3 inch spacing.
Dig out soil, sieve it, and put it back in.
Cover so they don't dry out.
Try Nantes-type carrots.

meta.block_note: Need to clear tables in garage

title: plant carrots
description: When planted, cover them with boards propped up to maintain humidity.

title: germinate onions
description:
Need 72 plants.
Refer to this guide: https://www.theseasonalhomestead.com/how-to-grow-onions-from-seeds/

title: plant potatoes
description:
90 plants, 12 inch spacing.
6 inch depth, NO nitrogen, mulch heavily after emergence to keep cool.

Seed potatoes are ready to plant when they have short bulky sprouts that are starting to turn
green. Planting 1 to 2 weeks before your last frost ensures that the seed potatoes are protected
underground if it does frost, but by the time the greens emerge (which are susceptible to frost)
that danger of frost has passed.

title: sow sweet potatoes
description:
18 plants, 12 inch spacing.
soil temp 65+, not soaked.
Shaded with mulch, but not touching.
Maintain even moisture.

Fertilise corn with urine mix
description:
1 part urine, 9 parts water. Give each corn plant ~133 ml of the mix. 
1.1 litres of urine needed total.

title: fertilise corn row
description:
For each 30 ft row:
3 lb lime 
2 lb bonemeal
2 lb langbeinite
All the compost
Broadfork it in.

Or, use 1 lb of SoP instead of langbeinite.

title: Prep sweet potato area
description:

title: Add amendments to rows 7, 9, 11, 12.
description:
For each full row (90sqft):
3 lb dolomite lime
2 lb bonemeal
2 lb langbeinite

| row | bone meal   | lime | langbeinite |
|-----|-------------|------|-------------|
| 7   |             | ✓    | ✓           |
| 9   |             | ✓    | ✓           |
| 11  |             | ✓    | ✓           |
| 12  | needs 662 g | ✓    | ✓           |
